title: Stale dashboard HEAD - displayed commit differs from actual
description: Dashboard shows old git HEAD while actual repo has moved forward, creating false sense of current state
symptoms: Status appears green but repo has changed
User makes decisions based on outdated information
root_cause: Dashboard caches HEAD value and doesn't refresh automatically

steps: Store timestamp when HEAD was fetched
Display age of data (e.g., '5 minutes ago')
Add refresh button or auto-refresh interval
Show STALE warning if data older than threshold

prevention.precheck_rule: Check if displayed HEAD matches actual HEAD
